flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Raritan Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Raritan Valley Community College rose 64% between 2006 and 2009 (10.8% → 17.6%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Raritan Valley Community College are 11% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($48.1k vs $43.3k).
